author: y4rr
content: Result: InceptionV3 V.4 conformance lane delivered. 5 fixture-backed tests in conformance_vision_models.rs (inception_v3_v4_output_shape_299x299, output_finite, param_count_fixture, custom_classes_fixture, determinism_fixture). fixtures_v_parity.json extended with inception_v3_v4_* entries. regenerate_vision_v_fixtures.py extended with V.4 section. 90/90 conformance_vision_models tests pass. Workspace build + clippy --workspace --all-targets clean. Commit: 69a7f406.
